data.title: Climb Global Solutions to hold Q4 and full year 2025 conference call on Feb 26, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. ($CLMB)
data.description: Climb Global Solutions, Inc., a leading IT channel company listed on NASDAQ under CLMB, will conduct a conference call on February 26, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. EST to review its financial performance for Q4 and FY 2025 ending on December 31. The company specializes in delivering sales and distribution services for tech vendors globally. The official financial results will be disclosed in a press release preceding the call. The event will provide insights into Climb's quarterly and annual figures, offering investors and stakeholders a comprehensive overview of its financial standing.

data.title: Gaia's 5th annual Emersion Conference offers $99 livestream option in 185 countries on March 14-15, 2026 in Boulder.
data.description: An Experiential Healing Conference featuring prominent speakers will be held on March 14-15, 2026, at the GaiaSphere Event Center in Boulder, Colorado. This event is set to host renowned experts in the field and provide attendees with a unique opportunity for healing and personal growth.

data.title: Willis Lease Finance Corp launches Willis Module Shop for engine restoration, showing strong EGT margin recovery.
data.description: The recent restoration of the first engine saw a significant recovery in EGT margin, showcasing strong performance. This successful restoration not only highlights a positive trend in margin recovery but also bolsters the fleet transition strategy. The engine restoration has played a crucial role in achieving these milestones, signaling the success of the company's operational approach. This achievement is a testament to the dedication and expertise of the team involved in the restoration process. The successful restoration has set a promising precedent for future engine repairs.
Bank introduces plan to optimize branches for growth, expects to close 20 locations to improve efficiency.

data.title: Reborn Coffee reports positive operating income progress in logistics and anticipates growth by 2026.
data.description: Reborn Coffee recently released an operational update regarding Reborn Logistics, showcasing significant progress in operating income. The company reported a remarkable increase in operational income figures, indicating positive momentum in financial performance. Additionally, Reborn Coffee emphasized the 2026 growth outlook for Reborn Logistics, hinting at future expansion and development prospects. This update underscores the success and potential of Reborn Logistics under the overarching Reborn Coffee brand.

data.title: CorMedix to join investor conferences in March. (Feb 12, 2026) - Nasdaq: CRMD. Expert management presenting.
data.description: CorMedix Therapeutics (Nasdaq: CRMD) from Berkeley Heights, N.J., shared today the news about their senior management's plans to present and engage in investor meetings at conferences scheduled for March 2026. The company is involved in developing and marketing therapeutic products for critical diseases and conditions. The involvement of senior management in these events signifies a significant step in the company's investor relations strategy and highlights their commitment to transparency and communication with stakeholders. Keep an eye out for these developments if you are closely following CorMedix Therapeutics' progress in the biopharmaceutical sector.

data.title: Jet.AI Inc. announces capital structure update and strategic flexibility in connection with a merger agreement amendment with flyExclusive, Inc. (NYSE: FLYX) on Feb. 11, 2026.
data.description: In Las Vegas, NV on February 12, 2026, Jet.AI Inc. ("Jet.AI" or the "Company") revealed significant updates related to its financial framework, funding agreements, and strategic adaptability following the signing of a new amendment on February 11, 2026. The company, listed on Nasdaq as JTAI, specializes in high-performance GPU infrastructure and AI cloud services, and is in the process of amending its Amended and Restated Agreement and Plan of Merger and Reorganization with flyExclusive, Inc. (NYSE: FLYX). This move aims to enhance the company's position alongside flyExclusive and optimize its growth potential.

data.title: YY Group's Ken Teng awarded HAPA Hospitality Service Entrepreneur Award in Malaysia for excellence in leadership.
data.description: Recognition has been given to outstanding individuals in the Malaysian hospitality industry for their exceptional service and leadership. The honorees have demonstrated excellence in delivering top-notch service and displaying strong leadership qualities, contributing significantly to the market. This recognition highlights their dedication and hard work in the industry, setting a high standard for others to follow. The event showcased the achievements of individuals who have made a notable impact, with a total of XX honorees receiving this prestigious recognition. Their commitment to excellence serves as an inspiration to others in the industry, shaping the future of hospitality in Malaysia.

data.title: Approximately 49,000 BTC moved from miner wallets in 2 days in January, with limited public sales reported, suggesting no broad capitulation.
data.description: Recent data from Onchain indicates a significant movement of approximately 49,000 BTC from miner wallets within a span of two days. Despite this substantial transfer, public disclosures imply that these movements are not indicative of widespread capitulation within the market.

data.title: SGS acquires Murray-Brown Laboratories, a leading food testing lab in Denver, expanding its capabilities in North America.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, in Bloomfield, New Jersey, SGS, a top company in testing, inspection, and certification, disclosed their acquisition of Murray-Brown Laboratories. This Denver-based food testing lab is widely recognized across the nation in the United States.

data.title: Chiquita energizes 2026 Miami Marathon with nutrition and flavor, providing fuel and fun to participants.
data.description: A popular fruit company infused flavor, energy, and excitement into an international marathon renowned for its diversity, held in Miami. From January 23-25, Chiquita participated in the Life Time Miami Marathon & Half presented by FP Movement. The event boasted a record number of attendees, with over X participants tackling the challenging course through the city's vibrant streets. Chiquita's presence added a unique touch to the marathon, offering runners refreshing snacks and motivating them with their vibrant branding. This collaboration emphasized the brand's commitment to promoting a healthy and active lifestyle.

data.title: Häagen-Dazs partners with 2026 Family Style events, debuts Cherry Dark Chocolate Bar and Exclusive Champion Collaboration.
data.description: A well-known premium ice cream brand has been selected as the official ice cream partner for all five 2026 family style events. The brand announced this exciting news at an event in Oakland, Walnut Creek, California, on February 12, 2026. Häagen-Dazs also introduced a new cherry dark chocolate bar and an exclusive collaboration with Champion during the event. This partnership is expected to reach a significant audience, given the popularity of the brand and the anticipated attendance at the upcoming events.

data.title: The Shipyard invests in FancyAI for brand discovery, to lead clients in generative search era. Columbus, Ohio, Feb 12, 2026.
data.description: An agency based in Columbus, Ohio, known for creating strong brand connections, revealed on Feb. 12, 2026, their strategic decision to invest in FancyAI, a Generative Engine Optimization company. The Shipyard aims to guide clients through the Generative Search Era with a long-term business plan. Specific details of the investment and partnership were not disclosed, emphasizing the agency's commitment to adapting to emerging trends. This move showcases The Shipyard's dedication to staying ahead in the industry and providing innovative solutions to their clients.

data.title: Power Monitors, Inc. launched Merlin™, AI system for utilities to analyze power quality data faster.
data.description: In a recent announcement on February 12, 2026, Power Monitors, Inc. unveiled the debut of Merlin™, a cutting-edge AI system. This innovative technology is specifically crafted to aid electric utilities in the swift analysis, comprehension, and response to power quality (PQ) data. Boasting unparalleled speed and consistency, Merlin™ promises a significant leap forward in this field.

data.title: VanLab introduces first Kia Collection PV5 Camping Kit for easy transition between commute and camping. LOS ANGELES, Feb. 12, 2026.
data.description: With a contemporary flatpack DIY conversion kit, drivers can seamlessly transition from their daily commute to a campsite in just minutes. Recently, VanLab, a prominent provider of such kits, introduced the inaugural camping kit tailored for the latest Kia PV5 Passenger model in Los Angeles on February 12, 2026. This innovative design allows for a quick and convenient conversion, enhancing the camping experience for Kia PV5 Passenger owners.
